zero_crossings.message: P/C spread crossed below zero in front bucket: +16.2 -> -29.8 pts. Historical pattern: call skew dominance flags elevated upside chase/squeeze risk.
P/C spread normalized back above zero in front bucket: -3.4 -> +5.6 pts. Bullish euphoria fading.
P/C spread normalized back above zero in 2w bucket: -1.6 -> +0.8 pts. Bullish euphoria fading.
P/C spread normalized back above zero in 1m bucket: -6.2 -> +5.1 pts. Bullish euphoria fading.
P/C spread normalized back above zero in 2m bucket: -5.7 -> +4.3 pts. Bullish euphoria fading.
